steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank is the main verb of the sentence. The subject is "The historian's books about Zachary Taylor" — the head noun is books, which is plural. The possessive "historian's" and the prepositional phrase "about Zachary Taylor" modify the subject but do not change its number. The verb must agree with books.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'are': plural present tense — matches the plural subject books. ✓
  • Choice B — 'was': singular past tense — does not agree with the plural books. ✗
  • Choice C — 'has been': singular present-perfect — does not agree with the plural books. ✗
  • Choice D — 'is': singular present tense — does not agree with the plural books. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
